title: Maple Syrup Flaky Canadian Dumplings
description: A sweet and flaky Canadian dessert featuring maple syrup, double cream, and dumplings. These dumplings are a great hangover cure and are considered diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Combine flour, cold butter, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl to make the dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of double cream in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the cream and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and add the dumplings. Cook for 5 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings warm with additional maple syrup drizzled on top.
